_comment: Single source of truth for all mood arcs, emotion mappings, and character profiles. Used by Story Weaver, Mood Weaver router, and Indie Comic Pipeline. 'arc_beats' are used by existing loaders; 'mood_stages' are the canonical stage labels used by EmotionRouter.

sadness.description: From heaviness toward genuine small warmth
sadness.motif_hint: something small that holds warmth (a cup, a candle, a patch of sunlight)
sadness.end_note: End with something small but genuinely warm. Not fixed. But lighter.

joy.description: From spark of joy toward luminous transcendence
joy.motif_hint: something that multiplies light (reflections, laughter lines, open hands)
joy.end_note: End with pure presence. Joy has become larger than its cause.
joy.visual_prompt: from spark of joy to overflowing radiance

anger.motif_hint: something that absorbs heat (running water, open window, cold surface)
anger.end_note: End with the body calm. Situation unresolved but person grounded.
anger.visual_prompt: from contained fire to grounded release

fear.motif_hint: something tactile and grounding (textured surface, bare feet, single object)
fear.end_note: End with presence. Not solved. But here, now, in this body.
fear.visual_prompt: from tight anxiety to grounded calm

love.motif_hint: something shared between two people (a held hand, a shared window, intertwined roots)
love.end_note: End with both people changed. Love as transformation, not destination.

grief.description: From the shape of absence toward carrying
grief.motif_hint: something that was shared (a chair, a mug, a particular quality of light)
grief.end_note: End with both things true: the loss is real, and life continues.
grief.visual_prompt: from loss through memory to light

surprise.description: From unexpected revelation toward expansive curiosity
surprise.motif_hint: something found unexpectedly (an object out of place, a door where none was)
surprise.end_note: End with curiosity replacing shock. The world is stranger and richer.

determined.motif_hint: something that holds the cost of the climb (scarred hands, a broken weapon, a worn path)
determined.end_note: End with victory earned, not given. The character is changed by the climb.

tired.motif_hint: something soft and horizontal (a pillow, blanket fold, evening light)
tired.end_note: End with genuine rest. Tomorrow is not in this panel.

Wanderer.description: a young figure with hollow eyes and tired expression, wearing a worn grey coat
Wanderer.visual_style: muted colors, soft edges, melancholic atmosphere

Ember.description: a radiant figure with a wide warm smile and bright observant eyes, wearing colorful layered garments
Ember.visual_style: vibrant colors, warm golden tones, glowing light halos

Kael.description: a powerful broad-shouldered figure with an intense gaze and battle-worn layered armor, jaw set hard
Kael.visual_style: dark desaturated colors, sharp angular lines, dramatic side-lighting

Aria.description: a graceful figure with soft eyes and a quiet smile, wearing flowing layered robes in blues and greens
Aria.visual_style: soft cool colors, flowing organic lines, romantic light diffusion

Elias.description: a worn figure with deep-set shadowed eyes and a sorrowful downward expression, wearing dark layered clothing
Elias.visual_style: muted desaturated colors, deep shadows, dense atmospheric fog

Vesper.description: a nimble curious figure with wide alert eyes and an open expression, wearing practical travel clothes covered in pockets
Vesper.visual_style: mixed unexpected colors, dynamic angles, environment full of hidden details

Riven.description: a resolute compact figure with a steel-grey gaze and determined posture, wearing worn functional armor with visible repairs
Riven.visual_style: strong clean lines, bold high-contrast colors, heroic grounded composition
